news.summary: Two drones struck Azerbaijan on Thursday, injuring four people according to Baku, which accuses Iran and is threatening ‘retaliation’. Tehran, for its part, denies being behind the strikes and blames Israel instead.

news.headline: Thousands of students rally after woman's explicit images circulated
news.summary: The rally was called by UCD Students' Union after a sexually explicit image was sent to hundreds of people.
